growth_records.strain: Ca. Nitrosotenuis uzonensis (AOA, Thaumarchaeota group I.1a, highly enriched culture)

up.method: Michaelis-Menten fit; Km(app)=41.4 uM total ammonium (~5.2 uM NH3, n=3); protein-normalized Vmax not reported

sec.method: AOA incomplete oxidizer; product nitrite; rate not reported

growth_records.cite: Kits et al. Kinetic analysis of a complete nitrifier reveals an oligotrophic lifestyle. Nature (2017). DOI:10.1038/nature23679. [PMC5600814]
growth_records.snippet: For Ca. N. uzonensis (41.4 uM total ammonium, ~5.2 uM NH3, n = 3) ... even higher mean Km(app) values were measured, showing variability of substrate affinity within group I.1a AOA.
growth_records.notes: Km(app, total ammonium)=41.4 uM (~5.2 uM NH3, n=3), reported as a substrate-affinity constant (half-saturation), not a specific uptake rate. No protein-normalized Vmax, no yield, no growth rate/doubling time for this enrichment. AO medium composition referenced elsewhere; only 1 mM NH4+ working stated. Optimum temperature 42 C.

up.method: Michaelis-Menten fit; Km(app)=8.6-9.5 uM total ammonium (~870-960 nM NH3, n=2); protein-normalized Vmax not reported

sec.method: AOA incomplete oxidizer; product nitrite; rate not reported

growth_records.cite: Kits et al. Kinetic analysis of a complete nitrifier reveals an oligotrophic lifestyle. Nature (2017). DOI:10.1038/nature23679. [PMC5600814]
growth_records.snippet: the closely related strain 5A (8.6 to 9.5 uM total ammonium, ~870 to 960 nM NH3, n = 2), even higher mean Km(app) values were measured, showing variability of substrate affinity within group I.1a AOA.
growth_records.notes: Km(app, total ammonium)=8.6-9.5 uM (~870-960 nM NH3, n=2), a substrate-affinity constant not a specific rate. Enrichment culture propagated at 42 C, fed 0.5-1 mM NH4Cl. No Vmax/yield/growth rate reported. AO medium composition referenced elsewhere; only NH4Cl feeding conc stated (0.5-1 mM).
